summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pipeline page functionality including backend APIs and frontend UI. Backend APIs are fully functional with 25/25 tests passing including new Pipeline-specific tests. Frontend Pipeline page is working correctly with two tracks, drag-and-drop, sorting, and lead management features when authenticated.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire frequently during testing, causing redirects to login page

passed_tests: Backend API health check (25/25 tests passed)
Lead filtering by pipeline stage (New Contact, Interested, Send Portfolio)
Lead creation with specific pipeline stages (New Contact, Interested, Unknown, Call Again 1)
Two tracks display: Lead Workflow (8 columns) and Follow-up Track (6 columns)
Lead cards display with company name, phone, city, assigned member
Add Lead buttons present in each column (14 total)
Add Lead modal functionality with form fields
Column sort dropdowns in each column header
Drag and drop functionality between columns
Pipeline stage data distribution across columns
Lead cards show portfolio badge, days since contact, next follow-up
Company name links for navigation to Lead Overview
action_item_for_main_agent: Session timeout issue needs to be addressed urgently - JWT token expiration is too short causing frequent authentication failures during normal usage. Consider increasing ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES or implementing automatic token refresh mechanism.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (Pipeline functionality working correctly, but session timeout issue affects user experience)
